# Project Guidelines

## Architecture
- Current workspace state: single static asset at `avatar.jpg.jpg`.
- Treat this repository as a CV website project in early bootstrap stage.
- Keep future structure simple and discoverable (for example: `src/`, `public/`, `assets/`, `styles/`).

## Build and Test
- No build, run, or test commands are defined yet.
- When tooling is added, prefer adding explicit scripts and updating this file with exact commands.

## Conventions
- Prefer small, focused commits and avoid broad refactors in early setup.
- Preserve existing file names unless a rename is explicitly requested.
- When adding docs, link focused files instead of duplicating content.
